message:
fix: Disable async pipelining temporarily (data race crashes)

Async pipelining was causing crashes due to batch pointer invalidation.
The worker thread was accessing batch data that the main thread was
modifying, causing data races and segfaults.

Disabled for now but infrastructure preserved for future fix.
Next: Implement speculative decoding for 2-3x speedup.

Current state:
- Synchronous decode working
- Partial GPU offload (24/29 layers)
- Flash attention enabled
- Ngram cache active
- All async infrastructure code preserved (just not spawned)
